mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, A.MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' AND A.INSTCD IN
#{instCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_OPERATOR_TRACE (TRACE_ID, MODULE_KEY, SCREEN_ID, API_PATH, MEMO, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, #{moduleKey}, #{screenId}, #{apiPath}, #{memo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForSearch', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForDetail', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForSubmit', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForChange', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForDiagnose', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForReconcile', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForHistory', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBREPOCHANGE SET UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy}, MEMO = #{memo}, CHANGE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBAI_SQL_TRACE (TRACE_ID, SQL_ID, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{traceId}, 'selectForExport', 'TBREPOCHANGE', 'REVISIONMEMO', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-1: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_1' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-2: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_2' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-3: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_3' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-4: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_4' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-5: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_5' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-6: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_6' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-7: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_7' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-8: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_8' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-9: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_9' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-10: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_10' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-11: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_11' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-12: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_12' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-13: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_13' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-14: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_14' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-15: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_15' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-16: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_16' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')

SELECT A.ID, A.INSTCD, A.USERID, U.USERNM AS CURRENT_NAME, A.REVISIONMEMO AS SNAPSHOT_NAME, A.STATUS, TO_CHAR(A.SUBMIT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SUBMIT_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CHANGE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CHANGE_DT, A.BATCH_YN, A.SKIP_REASON, A.SOURCE_REVISION, A.SCREEN_ID, A.TRANSACTION_ID, A.UPDATED_BY, 'trace-point-17: 소스변경추적' AS MEMO FROM TBREPOCHANGE A JOIN TBUSER U ON A.INSTCD = U.INSTCD WHERE A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.TRANSACTION_ID = 'repository_trace_tx_17' AND NVL(U.USERNM, ' ') <> NVL(A.REVISIONMEMO, ' ')
